meaning: n.残余,渣滓,滤渣,残数,剩余物
examples: The residue of the estate was divided equally among his children.
Always using the same shampoo means that a residue can build up on the hair.
This incineration generated a large quantity of residue ash.
Mount told the court there are ways to determine the source of the bomb residue.
Flying at just below 10, 000 feet, research instruments identified three distinct layers of volcanic residue.
